most_useful_feature: The class detail screens status banners made it obvious what was happening with a class.
confusing_part: Wasn't sure at first if the Description field on the report form was optional.
suggested_improvement: Add an explicit 'optional' label next to Description, not just the character-count hint.

most_useful_feature: The search and day filters on the Schedule screen very fast to find a class.
confusing_part: Typed an invalid room number on the report form and got no error message, so I wasn't sure it registered.
suggested_improvement: Add live inline validation on the report form so mistakes are caught before submitting.

most_useful_feature: The overall flow from Home to Schedule to Report felt fast and logical end-to-end.
confusing_part: Nothing major  the admin dashboard terms ('pending review') took a second to parse.
suggested_improvement: Consider a short tooltip or legend explaining the admin dashboard summary card labels.
